anaalIJzer.editor.externalSettings.title: Editor
anaalIJzer.editor.externalSettings.backingStoreDescription: Stored in AnaalIJzer Visual Studio options.

layerIndicators.enableInlineLayerBadges.title: Show layer badges
layerIndicators.enableInlineLayerBadges.description: Show the resolved AnaalIJzer layer path after type declaration identifiers.

layerIndicators.enableLayerCodeLens.title: Show layer metadata above declarations
layerIndicators.enableLayerCodeLens.description: Show a clickable CodeLens-style AnaalIJzer layer summary above type declarations.

layerIndicators.showLayerBadgesWhenNotIn.title: Show layer badges when not in layer
layerIndicators.showLayerBadgesWhenNotIn.description: Show a neutral badge after type declarations that are not assigned to any configured AnaalIJzer layer.

layerIndicators.showGlobalLayerRulesInBa.title: Show global layer rules in badge hover
layerIndicators.showGlobalLayerRulesInBa.description: Include wildcard dependency rules such as '* (any layer)' in layer badge hover details.

layerIndicators.showLinearCallChainInBad.title: Show mini call graph in badge hover
layerIndicators.showLinearCallChainInBad.description: Show a compact dependency chain in layer badge hover details when the configured graph is a straight one-to-one chain.

layerIndicators.enableLayerGlyphs.title: Gutter glyphs
layerIndicators.enableLayerGlyphs.description: Show a glyph beside type declarations that belong to an AnaalIJzer layer.

layerIndicators.enableLayerBlockHighligh.title: Highlight code in layer
layerIndicators.enableLayerBlockHighligh.description: Show a region-like block highlight around type declarations that belong to an AnaalIJzer layer.

layerIndicators.enableLayerBackgroundTin.title: Tint layer declaration text
layerIndicators.enableLayerBackgroundTin.description: Apply the older line background tint to type declarations that belong to an AnaalIJzer layer.

layerInformation.showAll.title: Show all layer information
layerInformation.showAll.description: Enable or disable inline dependency-layer labels for every supported dependency site.

layerInformation.showConstructor.title: Show Constructor Layer Information
layerInformation.showConstructor.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for constructor and primary-constructor dependency sites.

layerInformation.showMethod.title: Show Method Layer Information
layerInformation.showMethod.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for method parameter dependency sites.

layerInformation.showMethodReturn.title: Show MethodReturn Layer Information
layerInformation.showMethodReturn.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for method return-type dependency sites.

layerInformation.showField.title: Show Field Layer Information
layerInformation.showField.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for field dependency sites.

layerInformation.showProperty.title: Show Property Layer Information
layerInformation.showProperty.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for property dependency sites.

layerInformation.showLocal.title: Show Local Layer Information
layerInformation.showLocal.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for local-variable dependency sites.

layerInformation.showNew.title: Show New Layer Information
layerInformation.showNew.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for object creation dependency sites.

layerInformation.showGenericInvocation.title: Show GenericInvocation Layer Information
layerInformation.showGenericInvocation.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for generic method invocation type-argument dependency sites.

layerInformation.showGenericArgument.title: Show GenericArgument Layer Information
layerInformation.showGenericArgument.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for generic type argument dependency sites.

layerInformation.showInheritance.title: Show Inheritance Layer Information
layerInformation.showInheritance.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for base-class dependency sites.

layerInformation.showInterfaceImplementa.title: Show InterfaceImplementation Layer Information
layerInformation.showInterfaceImplementa.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for implemented-interface dependency sites.

layerInformation.showAttribute.title: Show Attribute Layer Information
layerInformation.showAttribute.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for attribute dependency sites.

layerInformation.showStaticMember.title: Show StaticMember Layer Information
layerInformation.showStaticMember.description: Show inline dependency-layer labels for static member access dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showAll.title: Show all site diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showAll.description: Enable or disable inline site-diagnostic labels for every supported dependency site.

siteDiagnostics.showConstructor.title: Show Constructor Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showConstructor.description: Show inline labels for constructor and primary-constructor dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showMethod.title: Show Method Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showMethod.description: Show inline labels for method parameter dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showMethodReturn.title: Show MethodReturn Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showMethodReturn.description: Show inline labels for method return-type dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showField.title: Show Field Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showField.description: Show inline labels for field dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showProperty.title: Show Property Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showProperty.description: Show inline labels for property dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showLocal.title: Show Local Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showLocal.description: Show inline labels for local-variable dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showNew.title: Show New Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showNew.description: Show inline labels for object creation dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showGenericInvocation.title: Show GenericInvocation Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showGenericInvocation.description: Show inline labels for generic method invocation type-argument dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showGenericArgument.title: Show GenericArgument Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showGenericArgument.description: Show inline labels for generic type argument dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showInheritance.title: Show Inheritance Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showInheritance.description: Show inline labels for base-class dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showInterfaceImplementat.title: Show InterfaceImplementation Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showInterfaceImplementat.description: Show inline labels for implemented-interface dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showAttribute.title: Show Attribute Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showAttribute.description: Show inline labels for attribute dependency sites.

siteDiagnostics.showStaticMember.title: Show StaticMember Site Diagnostics
siteDiagnostics.showStaticMember.description: Show inline labels for static member access dependency sites.

dependencyGraphs.focusMode.title: Graph focus mode
dependencyGraphs.focusMode.description: Controls whether the dependency graph tool window shows all graphs, highlights graphs that affect the active editor, or filters to only those graphs.
enumItemLabels: Highlight graphs for the active editor
Filter to graphs for the active editor

dependencyGraphs.openAnlFilesInGraphEdit.title: Open .anl files in diagram editor
dependencyGraphs.openAnlFilesInGraphEdit.description: When an AnaalIJzer .anl settings file is opened or selected, show it in the dependency graph editor automatically.

dependencyGraphs.includeCodeEvidence.title: Include code evidence
dependencyGraphs.includeCodeEvidence.description: Include project-code evidence in dependency graph snapshots so layer boxes can show matching types and observed violations.

anaalIJzer.title: AnaalIJzer
anaalIJzer.description: Editor-only architecture awareness for AnaalIJzer rules.

anaalIJzer.editor.title: Editor
anaalIJzer.editor.description: Controls layer badges, layer highlighting, dependency-site labels, and dependency graph focus.
